title: tontanea herbacea
side_effects: Tontanea herbacea can have side effects if used improperly, such as digestive problems, nausea, and diarrhea due to its high alkaloid content. Prolonged use or excessive consumption may lead to headaches, dizziness, and fatigue, as the body struggles to process the plant's toxic compounds. In severe cases, improper use of tontanea herbacea can cause liver and kidney damage, as well as allergic reactions, such as skin rashes and respiratory issues. It is essential to consult a medical professional or a qualified herbalist before using tontanea herbacea to ensure safe and effective use.
